case_title: VALERIE MCCARTHY ET AL VS. TACKTOOK TACK TOOK

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,827.00 FILED BY MCCARTHY, VALERIE MCCARTHY, ROBERT R. AS TO DEFENDANT TOOK, TACKTOOK TACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON THE BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING TO MAR-21-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT'S PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY IS STILL PENDING", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM HAS BEEN DISCHARGED IN BANKRUPTCY. PLAINTIFF ROBERT MCCARTHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAKTOOK TACK TOOK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-21-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN COURT IN OPEN COURT. "DEFENDANT HAS FILED A PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY. THESE PROCEEDINGS ARE STAYED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2016 - CONTINUED TO OCT-07-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAS UNWILLING TO STIPULATE TO HAVING THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS VALERIE MCCARTHY & ROBERT MCCARTHY, AND DEFENDANT TACKTOOK TACK TOOK. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT TO APRIL 05, 2017 AT 1:30PM. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, VALERIE MCCARTHY, ROBERT R. AS TO DEFENDANT TOOK, TACKTOOK TACK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2016 - CONTINUED TO APR-05-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS VALERIE AND ROBERT MCCARTHY AND TACKTOOK TACK TOOK. DEFENDANT TACKTOOK TACK TOOK WAIVES PROCESS OF SERVICE. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED DUE TO THE DEFENDANT STILL HAS A MATTER PENDING IN BANKRUPTCY COURT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO SEP-16-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY IS STILL PENDING. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE MAY 20, 2016. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2017 - CONTINUED FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY PETITION TO SEP-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS VALERIE MCCARTHY AND ROBERT MCCARTHY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAKTOOK TACK TOOK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY PETITION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
